# Test Cases — FR-03: Forgot Password & Reset Password (Mobile)

**Total TCs:** 46 (31 EP + 15 BVA)
**Feature:** FR-03 — Forgot Password & Reset Password (Mobile)
**SRS Reference:** `eshop-srs.md` FR-03
**Generated by:** test-case-generator skill
**Date:** 2026-06-19

## Part 1: EP Test Cases

### FR03-EP-001 — Happy Path

| Field               | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **TC ID**           | FR03-EP-001                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Objective**       | Verify password reset with all valid inputs                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **EC Ref**          | EC01, EC08, EC15, EC24, EC33                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Pre-condition**   | SUT is running. User `test@eshop.com` exists in DB.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Test Data**       | `email_step1 = "test@eshop.com"`, `email_step2 = "test@eshop.com"`, `otp_code = "123456"`, `newPassword = "Test@123"`, `confirmNewPassword = "Test@123"`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Steps**           | **[UI Execution]:**<br>1. Navigate to Forgot Password screen.<br>2. Enter `email_step1` and submit.<br>3. Retrieve `otp_code` from notification dialog.<br>4. Enter `otp_code`, `newPassword`, and `confirmNewPassword`.<br>5. Click Reset button.<br><br>**[API Execution]:**<br>1. Send POST `/api/forgot-password` with `email_step1`.<br>2. Retrieve OTP.<br>3. Send POST `/api/reset-password` with `email_step2`, `resetToken`, `newPassword`.<br><br>**[Teardown]:** Restore original password hash for `test@eshop.com`. |
| **Expected Result** | **[UI]:** Step 1 succeeds and moves to Step 2. Required markers (`*`), secure password entry, correct keyboard presented. Step 2 succeeds and navigates to Login page (per FR-03).<br>**[API]:** Both endpoints return HTTP 200 OK.<br>**[State]:** DB password hash updated (per FR-03) and OTP marked as used (per SEC-07).                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Test Channel**    | UI + API + State                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Observed Result** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Status**          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

### FR03-EP-002 — Invalid Email Step 1 (Missing @)

| Field               | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **TC ID**           | FR03-EP-002                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Objective**       | Verify password reset step 1 rejects email missing @ symbol                                                                                                                                                           |
| **EC Ref**          | EC02                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Pre-condition**   | SUT is running. User `test@eshop.com` exists.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Test Data**       | `email_step1 = "invalidemail"`                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Steps**           | **[UI Execution]:**<br>1. Navigate to Forgot Password Step 1.<br>2. Enter `email_step1`.<br>3. Submit.<br><br>**[API Execution]:**<br>1. Send POST request to `/api/forgot-password` with `email_step1` in JSON body. |
| **Expected Result** | **[UI]:** Validation error message is displayed preventing submission (per FR-03).<br>**[API]:** API rejects request with HTTP 400 Bad Request (per FR-03).                                                           |
| **Test Channel**    | UI + API                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Observed Result** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Status**          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |

### FR03-EP-008 — Email Step 2 Mismatch

| Field               | Value                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **TC ID**           | FR03-EP-008                                                                                                              |
| **Objective**       | Verify password reset API rejects request when step 2 email differs from step 1                                          |
| **EC Ref**          | EC09                                                                                                                     |
| **Pre-condition**   | SUT backend is running. User requested OTP for `test@eshop.com`.                                                         |
| **Test Data**       | `email_step2 = "different@eshop.com"`, `otp_code` = valid OTP for `test@eshop.com`, `newPassword` = valid                |
| **Steps**           | 1. Send POST request to `/api/reset-password` using the mismatched `email`, valid `resetToken`, and valid `newPassword`. |
| **Expected Result** | API rejects request with HTTP 400/403 due to email mismatch / cross-email validation failure (per SEC-07).               |
| **Test Channel**    | API                                                                                                                      |
| **Observed Result** |                                                                                                                          |
| **Status**          |                                                                                                                          |

### FR03-EP-014 — Wrong OTP Digits

| Field               | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **TC ID**           | FR03-EP-014                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Objective**       | Verify password reset rejects incorrect OTP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **EC Ref**          | EC16                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Pre-condition**   | SUT is running. User requested OTP for `test@eshop.com`. Real OTP is known but not used.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Test Data**       | `otp_code = "999999"` (incorrect), all other inputs valid.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Steps**           | **[UI Execution]:**<br>1. Proceed to Step 2 in app.<br>2. Enter wrong `otp_code`, valid `newPassword` and matching `confirmNewPassword`.<br>3. Submit.<br><br>**[API Execution]:**<br>1. Send POST request to `/api/reset-password` using valid `email`, wrong `resetToken`, valid `newPassword`. |
| **Expected Result** | **[UI]:** Displays "Invalid or expired OTP" error message (per FR-03).<br>**[API]:** Rejects request with HTTP 400/401 (per FR-03).                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Test Channel**    | UI + API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Observed Result** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Status**          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |

### FR03-EP-015 — Cross-Email OTP Attack

| Field               | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **TC ID**           | FR03-EP-015                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Objective**       | Verify password reset rejects OTP bound to a different email                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **EC Ref**          | EC17                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Pre-condition**   | OTP A requested for `test@eshop.com`. OTP B requested for `admin@eshop.com`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Test Data**       | Target account is `test@eshop.com`, `otp_code = <OTP B>`, valid password.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Steps**           | **[UI Execution]:**<br>1. Proceed to Step 2 for `test@eshop.com`.<br>2. Enter `OTP B`, valid `newPassword` and matching `confirmNewPassword`.<br>3. Submit.<br><br>**[API Execution]:**<br>1. Send POST `/api/reset-password` with `email="test@eshop.com"`, `resetToken=<OTP B>`, valid `newPassword`. |
| **Expected Result** | **[UI]:** Displays "Invalid or expired OTP" error.<br>**[API]:** Rejects request. API blocks cross-email attack (per SEC-07). HTTP 400/403.                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Test Channel**    | UI + API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Observed Result** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Status**          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

### FR03-EP-016 — OTP Reuse Attempt

| Field               | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **TC ID**           | FR03-EP-016                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Objective**       | Verify password reset rejects an already used OTP                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **EC Ref**          | EC18                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Pre-condition**   | OTP requested for `test@eshop.com` and successfully used to reset password.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Test Data**       | `otp_code = <Used OTP>`, all other inputs valid.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Steps**           | **[UI Execution]:**<br>1. Proceed to Step 2.<br>2. Enter exact same used `otp_code`, valid `newPassword` and `confirmNewPassword`.<br>3. Submit.<br><br>**[API Execution]:**<br>1. Send POST `/api/reset-password` using the used `resetToken`. |
| **Expected Result** | **[UI]:** Displays "Invalid or expired OTP" error.<br>**[API]:** API blocks reuse (per SEC-07). HTTP 400/401.                                                                                                                                   |
| **Test Channel**    | UI + API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Observed Result** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Status**          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

| **TC ID**           | FR03-EP-023                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Objective**       | Verify password reset rejects newPassword missing uppercase letter                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **EC Ref**          | EC26                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Pre-condition**   | SUT is running. User requested OTP.                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Test Data**       | `newPassword = "test@123"`, `confirmNewPassword = "test@123"`, all other inputs valid.                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Steps**           | **[UI Execution]:**<br>1. Proceed to Step 2.<br>2. Enter valid OTP.<br>3. Enter weak `newPassword` and matching `confirmNewPassword`.<br>4. Submit.<br><br>**[API Execution]:**<br>1. Send POST `/api/reset-password` with weak `newPassword`. |
| **Expected Result** | **[UI]:** Displays weak password validation error (per FR-01/FR-03).<br>**[API]:** System rejects input with HTTP 400.                                                                                                                         |
| **Test Channel**    | UI + API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Observed Result** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Status**          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

### FR03-BVA-001 — `newPassword` length at -α

| ------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |

| **Objective**       | Verify password reset rejects empty newPassword                                              |
| **BVA Ref**         | `newPassword` length: 0 chars (-α)                                                           |
| **Pre-condition**   | SUT backend is running. User requested OTP.                                                  |
| **Test Data**       | `newPassword = ""`, valid email/otp                                                          |
| **Steps**           | 1. Send POST request to `/api/reset-password` with empty `newPassword`.                      |
| **Expected Result** | API rejects empty password with HTTP 400. Error message indicates missing field (per FR-01). |

| **Observed Result** |                                                                                              |
| **Status**          |                                                                                              |
